name: Re:zero World
description:
Suddenly, you appeared in the world of Re:Zero! Most of the main characters are here, with their respective appearances, abilities, and backstories.

Right now, the story’s happening during the 4th arc, but if I get some support, I’ll keep adding more!

Please note that in this story, Subaru Natsuki doesn't exist and you are the protagonist; you are his replacement!

Let's call it an alternate universe. I decided that, to include all the characters and their personalities, I'd remove the inevitable event of the archbishops' attack. So, for their respective reasons, all the characters are in Priestess. And in case you're wondering, yes, I'm happy to tell you that Rem is alive and conscious!

1st Edit: I added the mabeasts, with their respective stories and abilities, so as not to be so annoying, I made them appear in certain parts, like the Great Rabbit, which appears in the snow or snowy deserts.

Keep in mind that JMLL constantly makes mistakes and follows patterns. Even if you try to fix them, they'll always happen over time. If you encounter any problems, please leave them in the comments!

Tags: Re Zero, Rezero, Re:Zero, Subaru Natsuki, Emilia, Ram, Rem, Echidna, Satella, RPG, isekai, Return by Death, fighting, war, candidacy, Combat bot, Regulus corneas, witch, world, kill, killers.
creator: Re-peak
